steps.title: Use two table points
steps.content: The table includes the points $(0{,}95)$ and $(1{,}105)$. Use these to find the slope and intercept of the linear relationship.

steps.title: Find the slope
steps.content:
From $(0{,}95)$ to $(1{,}105)$, the change in $y$ is $10$ and the change in $x$ is $1$:
$$
m=\frac{105-95}{1-0}=10
$$

steps.title: Write the equation
steps.content: The point $(0{,}95)$ gives the $y$-intercept, so the equation is $$ y=10x+95 $$ The answer is A.
